suite.name: Login E2E

test.name: TC-01 Iniciar sesión con credenciales válidas

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:#flash' contains text 'You logged into a secure area'.
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Verifica el flujo completo de autenticación exitosa.

test.name: TC-02 Rechazar credenciales inválidas con captura de pantalla en fallo

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:#flash' contains text 'Your username is invalid!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.doc: Verifica el mensaje de error; el Teardown solo captura pantalla SI el test falla (no en cada caso).

test.name: TC-03 Navegar al área segura y cerrar sesión

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:#flash' contains text 'You logged out of the secure area!'.
kw.arg: You logged out of the secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Inicia sesión, espera la navegación a /secure por URL, y cierra sesión.

suite.doc: Práctica 11 — Sesión 6. Flujo completo de autenticación y navegación E2E usando localizadores CSS/XPath con waits explícitos y screenshot automático en fallo.
